summary.intent: Reproduce and fix GitHub issue #712 where optional enum MCP tool parameters cause LLMs to send the literal string 'null' instead of omitting the field.
summary.outcome: Root cause identified (two-layer bug in schema canonicalization + strict mode handling), fix applied with 3 new unit tests and 1 e2e scenario, all 251 tests passing, formatted and committed.

repo: Schema canonicalization in `sanitize_schema_for_openai_compat` strips `"type": "string"` from enum properties, leaving bare `{"enum": [...]}` schemas — valid JSON Schema but surprising for downstream consumers.
The `make_nullable()` function in strict_mode.rs must be called after canonicalization, so it must handle enum-only schemas (no `type` field) as a fallback case.
The CUDA build target fails on macOS by design; macOS CI uses `--features local-llm-metal` instead.
A pre-existing clippy error exists in `moltis-agents` unrelated to providers work.
Provider integration tests requiring API keys are skipped in local runs (104 of 251 skipped).

code.finding: make_nullable() previously only handled schemas with a `type` field or `anyOf`/`oneOf`. Enum-only schemas (post-canonicalization) fell through silently. Fix: extract `add_null_to_enum()` helper and call it both in the type-present branch and as a final enum-only fallback.
Canonicalization removes redundant `type` fields from enum schemas — the type is implied by enum values per JSON Schema spec.
E2e scenarios for tool argument serialization are driven from this JSON file; new scenarios can be added here to cover provider integration paths through canonicalization + strict mode.

workflow: Write a failing test before fixing to confirm the reproduction, then verify it passes after the fix.
When a unit test passes but an e2e test fails, the pipeline between them (canonicalization) is transforming the input — add a debug test to inspect intermediate state.
Run `cargo fmt` before committing; clippy and fmt are separate checks and both must be clean.
Verify pre-existing failures on main before attributing them to your changes.

friction: The two-layer nature of the bug (canonicalization strips type, then make_nullable skips enum-only schemas) required a second investigation round after the first fix passed unit tests but failed e2e tests.
CUDA build failure on macOS is a noisy red herring when running workspace-wide tests.
Pre-existing clippy error in `moltis-agents` required verification it wasn't introduced by this change.
open_items: Pre-existing clippy error in `moltis-agents` was confirmed unrelated but left unfixed.
104 integration tests are permanently skipped locally (require API keys) — no local signal on provider integration correctness beyond the JSON-driven e2e scenarios.
